Yan

hi Milana!))

Yan, Metallica is an American heavy metal band. The band was formed in 1981 in Los Angeles by vocalist/guitarist James Hetfield and drummer Lars Ulrich and has been based in San Francisco for most of its career.[1][2] The band's fast tempos, instrumentals and aggressive musicianship made them one of the founding bands of thrash metal, alongside Megadeth

I like Natasha Koroleva, sorry)
